skill.name: booth-invitation-writer
skill.description: Write personalized trade show booth invitation emails, pre-show outreach sequences, and exhibition meeting requests. Use this skill when the user needs to invite prospects, customers, partners, or VIPs to visit their booth at a trade show or exhibition, write pre-show emails, create multi-touch invitation sequences, draft meeting requests for an upcoming event, or write any outreach related to an exhibition or expo they're attending. Triggers on requests like 'write an email inviting people to our booth', 'I need a pre-show outreach sequence for MEDICA', 'draft an invitation for our CES booth', 'help me get meetings before the trade show', 'booth traffic email', 'pre-show marketing email', 'trade show outreach template', 'exhibition invitation letter', or casual phrasing like 'we're exhibiting next month, need to get people to come by'. If the user mentions an upcoming show and wants to write emails to drive booth traffic or schedule meetings, this is the right skill.
skill.summary: Write personalized trade show booth invitation emails and outreach sequences that drive booth traffic
skill.author: LensmorOfficial

security_audit.summary: All 34 static findings are false positives. The skill is a pure text generation skill for writing trade show booth invitation emails. The detected patterns (shell backticks, hardcoded URLs, path traversal) are all in documentation and example prompts, not executable code. No actual security risks identified.

content.value_statement: Generate personalized pre-show invitation emails that get responses instead of generic booth visit requests. Create tailored messages for cold prospects, existing customers, partners, and VIPs.
actual_capabilities: Write personalized booth invitation emails for cold prospects, warm contacts, and existing customers
Create subject line A/B variants to improve open rates
Generate follow-up reminder emails for non-responders
Adapt tone and style for different audiences (VIPs, partners, press, distributors)
Provide multi-language support for international exhibitions
Offer timing recommendations for pre-show email campaigns
limitations: Does not send or schedule emails - only generates content
Does not access exhibitor databases or CRM systems
Does not provide attendee contact information
Requires user to provide show details (name, dates, booth number)

use_cases.title: Exhibitor Booth Traffic
use_cases.description: Generate invitation emails to drive qualified visitors to your trade show booth
use_cases.target_user: Marketing teams and sales representatives at companies exhibiting at trade shows

use_cases.title: Pre-Show Meeting Scheduling
use_cases.description: Create outreach sequences to book meetings with prospects before the event
use_cases.target_user: Business development professionals seeking to maximize event ROI

use_cases.title: Multi-Audience Outreach
use_cases.description: Tailor invitation messages for different contact types (customers, partners, press, VIPs)
use_cases.target_user: Event coordinators managing multiple stakeholder groups

prompt_templates.title: Basic Booth Invitation
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a booth invitation email for [SHOW NAME] [YEAR], booth [BOOTH NUMBER]. We sell [PRODUCT/SERVICE]. Target: [AUDIENCE].

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Audience Outreach
prompt_templates.prompt: I need to invite 3 types of people to our [SHOW] booth: existing customers, new prospects, and press contacts. We're showcasing [PRODUCT]. Write tailored emails for each group.
prompt_templates.scenario: Requesting different messages for multiple audience segments

prompt_templates.title: Pre-Show Sequence
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 3-email pre-show outreach sequence for [SHOW]. We want to get meetings with [TARGET AUDIENCE]. Include timing recommendations for each email.

prompt_templates.title: VIP Executive Invite
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a short, exclusive invitation for C-level executives to visit our booth at [SHOW]. We're offering [SPECIAL OFFER]. The tone should be professional and concise.
prompt_templates.scenario: Inviting high-value targets with limited time

output_examples.input: Write a booth invitation for MEDICA 2026, booth 5C42. We sell AI-powered surgical planning software. Target: orthopedic surgeons.
output_examples.output:
Subject: MEDICA 2026: See your next hip replacement planned in 90 seconds — Booth 5C42

Hi Dr. [Last Name],

Every complex joint replacement starts with planning — and right now, most of that planning still happens in 2D...

[Full email with demo time slots and CTA]

output_examples.input: I need to invite our existing customers to visit us at Hannover Messe. We sell factory automation solutions.
output_examples.output:
Subject: Hannover Messe: See What's New Since We Last Spoke

Hi [Name],

It's been a few months since we discussed your factory automation needs...

[Customer-focused email referencing relationship]

best_practices: Lead with the prospect's pain point or industry challenge, not your booth number
Offer specific time slots instead of 'stop by anytime' to increase response rates
Send first touch emails 3-4 weeks before the show, reminders 1 week before
anti_patterns: Using generic subject lines like 'Visit us at [SHOW]!' or 'You're invited!'
Leading with booth number instead of value proposition
Sending the same message to all audiences without tailoring tone or content

faq.question: What information do I need to provide?
faq.answer: Provide the trade show name and dates, your booth number, what you're showcasing, and your target audience.

faq.question: Can this skill send emails?
faq.answer: No, this skill generates email content only. You will need to copy the output into your email client or CRM.

faq.question: Does it support languages other than English?
faq.answer: Yes, you can request translations or specify a different language in your prompt.

faq.question: Can I get multiple email variations?
faq.answer: Yes, ask for A/B subject line variants or different angles for follow-up emails.

faq.question: What audience types are supported?
faq.answer: Cold prospects, existing customers, partners, distributors, press, and VIPs/executives.

faq.question: How long should booth invitation emails be?
faq.answer: Cold prospects: 80-120 words. Warm contacts: 120-180 words. VIPs: 60-80 words.
